description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered shingles and a prominent brick chimney emitting smoke. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a traditional, aged appearance. The front facade features a small covered porch with wooden railings and steps leading up to a set of double doors, flanked by two shuttered windows. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, most of which are shuttered or boarded, adding to the cabin's secluded, weathered charm. The roof overhangs on all sides, providing some shelter to the porch and side entrance. The overall structure suggests a cozy, single-story dwelling suitable for a forested or rural urban edge.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, brick chimney, and a small front porch. The exterior features weathered wood planks, shuttered windows, and a cozy, aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, a small covered porch, and two shuttered windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two large shuttered windows and the brick chimney rising above the roof.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view displaying three shuttered windows and the full expanse of the shingled roof.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing a small side entrance, two upper windows, and the overhanging roof with visible porch structure.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with overhangs and weathered asphalt shingles, featuring a prominent brick chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical distribution with two small shuttered windows on the front, two large shuttered windows on one side, three medium shuttered windows on the opposite side, and two small windows in the upper rear gable; most windows are rectangular and appear boarded or shuttered
attribute_door_placement: One main double door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, and a secondary single door on the rear side under a small overhang
